images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model exuding a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured in a rice paddy field. She wears a delicate silk slip dress that clings to her fit, curvy frame, highlighting her slim waist and ample chest with a trendy, form-fitting drape, the fabric's sheen contrasting against the organic surroundings. The background is a dreamy bokeh of swaying rice stalks under desaturated, muted tones, creating an angelic, otherworldly atmosphere. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
